ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Gas Analyzer) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the sensor */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* Maintenance history for the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., West Branch) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "location_notes" TEXT /* Additional information about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "check_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id")
)
column_names: Type of the sensor (e.g., Gas Analyzer)
Last calibration date of the sensor
Current status of the sensor (e.g., Active, Inactive)
